personal.name: Sanny Sherief
personal.title: Full Stack Web Developer
personal.description: I am a Los Angeles-based software developer who works with a variety of different languages and technologies.

introduction.heading: About me
contents: Born and raised in the city of Los Angeles, California, I have worked for several years developing software as both a hobbyist and as a professional. Leveraging the latest and greatest technologies, I'm able to take your product from idea to reality in record time.

Beginning with scripting for video games I played, I have transitioned to web development after attending Lambda School: an online course dedicated for web development. There, I honed my skills designing and creating web applications.
In my free time, I love to play video games on my computer, stay up late working on my personal projects, or just go out with friends.

contents.name: Freelance
contents.title: Web Developer
descriptions: While attending Lambda School, I started working as a freelance web developer.
I had previous experience freelancing during my time spent working on video game scripting, which helped me find my way around the freelance web development industry.

contents.name: Cloud Sixteen
contents.title: Developer
descriptions: I served as a developer and maintainer for the company's flagship roleplaying video gamemode product.

The design and development of numerous features provided in the product were contributed by me. Additionally, I investigated problems in relation to updates, as well as provided customer support through an online ticketing system.

contents.name: Thriving Ventures
contents.title: Developer
descriptions: I worked on some of the company's largest server administration products used by thousands of customers, and was the principal developer for implementing many parts of the user interface.
My responsibilities included maintaining the codebase written by previous developers, expanding it with new features, responding to customer inquiries, and deploying builds.

contents.name: My Portfolio
contents.description: The site you're viewing right now! I made it myself.

contents.name: GMod
contents.description: My website for showcasing my projects related to Garry's Mod.

contents.name: Mobile Template
contents.description: A template for mobile developers to showcase their work.

contents.name: Soul Starter
contents.description: This simple site finds your best starting class in Dark Souls 3.

contents.name: HTML
contents.description: General website structure development, laying the foundation for improvement via other technologies.

contents.name: CSS
contents.description: Designing website layouts, styling components, and ensuring visual consistency on all viewport sizes. Plain CSS, Bootstrap, Semantic UI, and Tailwind CSS.

contents.name: JavaScript
contents.description: Breathing life into websites through dynamic interactions on pages.

contents.name: React
contents.description: Single page applications, functional components, class components, hooks, fetching data, and state management.

contents.name: SQL
contents.description: CRUD operations, mass migrations, APIs, and ORM frameworks. Experience includes SQLite and MySQL/MariaDB.

contents.name: Lua
contents.description: Video game engine scripting and task automation. My personal favorite language to use, and the very first I've ever learned.
